properties.name: Attack, AoE, Duration, Lightning, Bow, Projectile, Trigger

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires an arrow into the air to land at a targeted location. On impact, deals area damage and creates a thunderstorm which blinds enemies within it. Entering the thunderstorm will cause it to gain stages, and leaving it will cause it to dissipate. Leaving the storm while it is at maximum stages will cause it to explode, dealing damage and triggering Thunderburst. You must use this skill yourself, it cannot be used by Totems, Traps, Mines, or other objects that use skills for you.
explicitMods: 60% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Modifiers to number of Projectiles do not apply to this Skill
Storms gain one stage per 0.25 seconds you are in it, up to a maximum of 4
Storms have 30% more Area of Effect per stage
Storms dissipate if you leave it before reaching maximum Stages, or 1.5 seconds after reaching maximum Stages
Explosion deals 300% more Damage with Hits and Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: 60% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
hybrid.secDescrText: Fires projectiles from the targeted location that move randomly and damage enemies they pierce through. They explode after a duration, dealing area damage.

its essence wandered the infinite,
learning, and preparing.

feel no longer. They dream only of
continuing to dream, and know not why.
